evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. While the use case mentions that the system coordinates timing and adjusts for delays, it does not provide concrete evidence of real-time updates being communicated to users or any specific API endpoints that facilitate this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for real-time updates.
gaps: No evidence of real-time updates being communicated to users.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
